entries.text: SD 1.5 is trained at 512x512; stay near 512 on the short edge — large native resolutions tile and duplicate subjects.
SD 1.5 responds well to 20-30 steps with CFG 7; very high CFG (>12) tends to look fried.
Emphasis with parentheses, e.g. (sharp focus:1.2), nudges weighting in SD 1.5 pipelines that support prompt weighting.
